<!-- Thanks for contributing to Regionlock! -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes and I added/updated tests
- [ ] `gofmt` + `go vet` clean
- [ ] If I added/changed a rule: updated the `regmap` ruleset(s), the chart
      policy (Kyverno + Gatekeeper), and kept the `rule-id` consistent
- [ ] If I added a jurisdiction: real article citations + a `regions` list
- [ ] Updated docs / README / CHANGELOG if user-facing
- [ ] I did not over-claim (evidence of controls, not cryptographic data-path proof)
